Video.summary: When one of Eastbridge's most powerful socialities, is murdered, it is discovered she has been running a call girl service and one name on her list of clients is Commissioner Scali!
Video.title: The Rolodex Madam

Video.summary: As Halloween approaches, a heart is cut from the body of a corpse at a funeral home and concerned Eastbridge parents pressure Tony to protect their children from the suspect, an eccentric recluse.
Video.title: The Witches Of Eastbridge

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall pursue the killer of college student who was the brother of Hunter's old friend.
Video.title: Investment In Death

Video.summary: When Nick Colette, the hot-headed son of a "retired" mobster Tommy Colette, joins forces with his father, Eastbridge's crime troubles start.
Video.title: Family Business

Video.summary: Following the death of his gangster son in a police shootout, mobster Tommy Colette vows to kill Tony Scali himself.
Video.title: Out Of Business

Video.summary: Tony is torn when a series of life-threatening incidents occur in Eastbridge and the only link appears to be Ed Mize, an old, mild-mannered friend currently experiencing marital difficulties.
Video.title: The Two Faces Of Ed

Video.summary: Commissioner -- and expectant father -- Tony Scali suddenly finds his own life on the line after he infiltrates a New York pornographic teenage film ring.
Video.title: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1

Image.alt: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1

Video.summary: Hunter searches for the killer of a runaway girl whose baby he helped to deliver.
Video.title: A Girl Named Hunter

Video.summary: Tony's son David is shocked when his friend Jason shoots Brad Harris, the school bully. What follows is a crisis of conscience.
Video.title: Guns & Sons

Video.summary: Commissioner Scali and his team of officers pull out all stops as they try to beat the clock in a desperate search for the kidnapper of a very sick baby.
Video.title: The Sharp Pinch

Video.summary: Tony suspects foul play when a member of a commando-like squad of elite prep-school students -- perpetrators of a series of break-in thefts -- disappears.
Video.title: Dead Cadet's Society

Video.summary: Tony joins a video-dating service when he suspects one of his clients is a murderous thief. Also, Stan tries to protect Carmela from a calirvoyant's curse.
Video.title: The Heart's A Lonely Sucker

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall are assigned to protect the Irish patriot brother of Devane's new lady friend.
Video.title: Shillelagh

Video.summary: Hunter defies departmental policy to save McCall from a kidnapper and bring her back to the police force.
Video.title: The Legion, Part 2

Video.summary: After Tony's expensive new automobile is stolen from him at gunpoint, he and Cyd clash over the best way to capture Eastbridge's busiest carjackers.
Video.title: Stoned

Video.summary: Commissioner Scali, kidnapped and seemingly destined for sudden death, narrowly escapes his fate with the help of an unsuspected ally -- porno movie producer Cyd Palmer.
Video.title: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2

Image.alt: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2

Video.summary: Hunter becomes involved with a beautiful radio host when he goes undercover to catch a killer.
Video.title: On Air

Video.summary: Hunter defies departmental policy to save McCall from a kidnapper and bring her back to the police force.
Video.title: The Legion, Part 1

Video.summary: A sexually molested stepdaughter is suspected in the stabbing death of her father.
Video.title: Daddy Dearest

Video.summary: A sexual extortion scheme turns to murder.
Video.title: Ladies Night Out

Video.summary: After becoming a licensed private detective, Ramone's first case stumbles into a murder.
Video.title: Ramone P.I.

Video.summary: A prostitute's murder uncovers a blackmail scheme.
Video.title: Escorting Disaster

Video.summary: Cassy is framed for the murder of her ex-boyfriend by a deranged man seeking revenge.
Video.title: Genius

Video.summary: A woman's split personality gives life to a murderous ventriloquist's dummy.
Video.title: Do You Believe In Magic?

Video.summary: Tom and Cassy's investigation into the murder of a TV news director leads them to suspect both a prominent reporter and her assistant.
Video.title: If The Shoe Fits

Video.summary: Tom and Cassy pursue a well known romance novelist who they suspect in a string of murders.
Video.title: Passion And The Palm Beach Detectives

Image.alt: Passion And The Palm Beach Detectives
Passion And The Palm Beach Detectives
Passion And The Palm Beach Detectives

Video.summary: A popular actress Tom and Cassy are told to help study for a new film role interferes with their investigation of an immigrant' s murder
Video.title: All The World's A Stage
